prompt: Implement a retry loop inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that retries up to 3 times if the connection handle is invalid before returning an error.
